tooltip_clusterNode: Enable if this node is part of a Proxmox cluster. All nodes marked as "Cluster Node" form a failover group � if one fails, the next one automatically takes over. Nodes WITHOUT this checkmark will be queried individually and independently. WARNING: Multiple single nodes from the same cluster will lead to duplicate processing of all VMs/LXCs!
cleanup_confirm_text: All datapoints of VMs and LXC containers that no longer exist in Proxmox will be deleted. Continue?
